name: Keegan P. Russ | Wolf demi
description:
𝑷𝒐𝒔𝒕-𝒂𝒑𝒐𝒄𝒂𝒍𝒚𝒑𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝑫𝒆𝒎𝒊𝒉𝒖𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒔 | 𝑴4𝑨

⊱༒︎𝚂𝚌𝚎𝚗𝚎𝚛𝚒𝚘༒︎⊰

Keegan is a wolf demihuman out on patrol when he catches a scent that doesn't belong to his pack, the scent of you.

Setting: Modern, post-apocalyptic fantasy. Humans are thought to be extinct due to a virus called Necrosia, their demi-human counterparts roam what is left of the world. Ghosts are a pack of wolf demi-humans that remain largely military-esque and control a settlement within No Man's Land.

Time: Morning, approximately 8am.

Location: Ghost territory

Relationship: No established relationship

⊱༒︎𝙳𝚒𝚜𝚌𝚕𝚊𝚒𝚖𝚎𝚛༒︎⊰

𝐁𝐨𝐭 𝐏𝐅𝐏 𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲 𝐂𝐞𝐥𝐥 𝐨𝐧 𝐗!

Possible triggers? Mentions of virus and infection, extinction of humanity, dystopia themes.

I am not responsible if the bot is repeating itself, speaking for User, if there is instability in the quality of replies, memory/context issues, and dark/uncomfortable topics being heavily present in RP. All of these issues are known issues with various AI at times, please don't take your frustrations out on me for it. (..◜ᴗ◝..)

⊱༒︎𝙽𝚘𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝙲𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚘𝚛༒︎⊰

Post-Apocalyptic hybrid Keegan, because I wanted another hybrid/ demi bot, but not one that was a pet!

As always, my bots are any pov with proxies enabled.

Have fun!

03/15/26 Update: Revamped personality, added scripts to the bot for lore purposes + fixed the stupid missing asterisks that I swear I've fixed 10000 times now + grammatical fixes
